{"society_power": 8.0, "state_power": 7.5, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Red Queen standoff: Yellow Vests, pension strikes, 49.3", "reasoning": "Society retained strong mobilizational capacity (Gilets jaunes, pension protests, hung parliaments checking the executive) even as its traditional intermediary channels weakened, roughly balancing out; the state simultaneously expanded coercive/emergency powers (COVID, security laws) but faced fiscal constraints and lost its parliamentary majority, netting little change on either axis."}
